actionCalls.name: Log_Account_Creation_Error_SNAP_to_ADI
actionCalls.label: Log Account Creation Error SNAP to ADI

actionCalls.name: Log_Account_Update_Error_SNAP_to_ADI
actionCalls.label: Log Account Update Error SNAP to ADI

formulas.description: For Create Records the first entry is blank
formulas.name: SetRecordLastSyncDatetimetoLastmodifiedornull
varFieldSummaryText
formulas.expression: IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Name__c})), {!$Record.Name__c}, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.RecordTypeID__c})), " | RecordTypeId: " & {!$Record.RecordTypeID__c}, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Phone__c})), " | Phone: " & {!$Record.Phone__c}, "" ) & IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Website__c})), " | Website: " & {!$Record.Website__c}, "" )& IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!$Record.Global_Account_ID__c})), " | Global_Account_ID__c: " & {!$Record.Global_Account_ID__c}, "" )

Flow.interviewLabel: Data 360 Accounts Upsert SNAP to ADI {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Data 360 Accounts Upsert SNAP to ADI

recordCreates.name: Create_SNAP_Account_Records_in_ADI
recordCreates.label: Create SNAP Account Records in ADI

recordLookups.name: Get_CRM_Record_by_Global_ID
recordLookups.label: Get CRM Record by Global ID

recordUpdates.name: Update_SNAP_Account_Records_in_ADI
recordUpdates.label: Update SNAP Account Records in ADI
